text:
This patchset provides more functionalities and fixes some bugs.
The author of the application recommends using the patchset.

Fix: put the attached patch in patches/patch-a?
or fetch directly from:
ftp://xcin.linux.org.tw/pub/xcin/xcin/patch/xcin-2.5.2.pre5.diff3.gz
